data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Remains Unaffected Despite White House Summit
data.description: According to PANews, Matrixport's latest report indicates that the recent White House cryptocurrency summit and the confirmation of the U.S. strategic Bitcoin reserve have failed to ignite market enthusiasm. The cryptocurrency market has not seen a significant rise, with perpetual contract funding rates remaining in single-digit levels. This suggests that retail investor interest remains subdued, contrasting sharply with April and December 2024, when funding rates surged to double-digit highs. Even the market momentum brought by U.S. President Donald Trump's official inauguration has been relatively muted, clearly indicating that Bitcoin requires more impactful catalysts to initiate a new upward trend.

data.title: IOST: Binance and other exchanges will support the upcoming airdrop, and the snapshot is planned to be taken on March 15
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The IOST Foundation announced that Binance, Upbit, BitKub, Coincheck, OKJ, BITPOINT and CoinTrade will support the upcoming airdrop. It is reported that the total airdrop allocation is 852.8 million IOST tokens. Users must hold at least 1,000 IOST tokens in their accounts on participating exchanges. The snapshot time is 00:00 UTC on March 15.

data.title: Bitget Wallet announces native integration of L1 blockchain Berachain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it has natively integrated the L1 blockchain Berachain, becoming the first wallet to deeply support the network. Users can access the Berachain mainnet through Bitget Wallet, manage and transfer ecological currencies, view K-line market and transaction data, and capture more trading opportunities through flash exchange and cross-chain functions. Berachain is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain that uses a liquidity proof (PoL) consensus mechanism to dynamically adjust validator incentives. Bitget Wallet and Berachain plan to launch the Berachain ecological event on March 19.

data.title: BitMart will launch ELX perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 50 times
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch Elixir (ELX) perpetual contract at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 10, 2025, and will open ELX/USDT trading pair with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
Elixir (ELX) is a decentralized financial platform that aims to provide institutions with efficient and secure crypto liquidity solutions.

data.title: Cayman Islands Requires VASP License for Crypto Firms by April 2025
data.description:
Blockchain.com, Crypto.com must secure a VASP License by July 2025 as the Cayman Islands enforces stricter AML and CTF regulations for crypto firms.
source: https://coincu.com/325763-cayman-islands-require-vasp-license-crypto-firms

data.title: Visa launches one-touch add card feature in Egypt to promote digital payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital payment giant Visa has launched the "One-touch Add Card" feature in the Egyptian market. Cardholders can add cards to their digital wallets by simply tapping their Visa contactless cards on their mobile devices. This feature protects cardholder data from fraud while eliminating the need to manually enter cards, encouraging wider adoption of digital payments. For card issuers, this feature can reduce the risk of configuration fraud and related costs, simplify the process of adding wallets, reduce customer service inquiries, and increase transaction approval rates. (The Fintech Times)

data.title: Economist Peter Schiff launches personal Bitcoin reserve, currently receives 0.055 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin critic and economist Peter Schiff has previously criticized Trump's cryptocurrency stance. He announced on the X platform that he would imitate the US government to launch a personal strategic Bitcoin reserve plan and follow suit to develop a budget-neutral strategy to obtain Bitcoin without increasing costs. He has currently received 0.055 BTC. Peter Schiff claimed that the donated Bitcoins would not be sold and planned to use hardware wallets to protect these Bitcoins. He said: "I want to sink with this ship, like a real HODLer." It is reported that Peter Schiff even launched the Solana reserve. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: Visa Introduces Tap-To-Add Card Feature in Egypt
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Visa has launched a new 'Tap-to-Add Card' feature in the Egyptian market, as reported by The Fintech Times on March 10. This feature allows cardholders to add their Visa contactless cards to digital wallets by simply tapping them on a mobile device.Malak El Baba, Visa's Country Manager and Vice President for Egypt, stated that the 'Tap-to-Add Card' feature is expected to boost customer confidence and encourage wider adoption of digital payments. For card issuers, this feature aims to reduce the risk of fraud configuration and associated costs, streamline the wallet addition process, decrease customer service inquiries, and improve transaction approval rates.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin’s current price trend recreates the situation after the launch of the US Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinDesk analyst James Van Straten wrote that since President Trump took office on January 20, the price of Bitcoin has fallen from $109,000 to $80,000, becoming a typical "sell-on-news" event. This pullback has continued since Friday's Digital Asset Summit. Although the price trend may indicate short-term bearishness, Bitcoin bulls may see it as a long-term positive catalyst because the US government has shifted from the hostile attitude of the previous administration to a more friendly stance. 
Similar price trends were staged during the highly anticipated launch of the US spot Bitcoin ETF in January 2024. From October 2023 to January 2024, Bitcoin soared from $25,000 to $49,000, an increase of more than 40%. However, the launch of the ETF marked a local high, as prices fell 20% in the following weeks, eventually hitting a new high of more than $73,000 in March. This time, after Trump won the US presidential election in November, Bitcoin rose 60%, hitting an all-time high of $109,000 in January, and then experienced a correction of nearly 30%. The common pattern in these two cases is that positive news triggered a local high in the price of Bitcoin, followed by a major correction. The next variable is whether Bitcoin will start to rise after this correction ends, which depends largely on the macroeconomic environment. (CoinDesk)
